Vimshottari system which gives us a maximum of 1,;!0 years.
In view of reports of people living beyond 120, we may have to
revise this figure. The degrees of the zodiac are exactly divis
ible by 120; and we can then take up any figure which can so
divide 360. Thus we can have an average arc of 2 or 3 or 4 or
5 or 6 degrees per year. And if we consider the horoscope to
represent a connecting link between the past life and the
future life of an individual, we can have an average measure
of one degree. And for purpose of this paper, we propose to
show how the average arc of one degree and the average arc of
three degrees actually work.
In the actual working of the directions, the entire empha
sis shifts to the aspects formed between the radical and pro
gressed positions. No aspect is good or bld in itself. Its precise
